description: Log2-transformed fold change in gene expression between the test group and reference group. Positive values indicate up-regulation (higher transcript abundance), while negative values denote down-regulation relative to the reference group.

Multiple testing-corrected p-value assessing the statistical significance of each gene's differential expression after controlling the false-discovery rate (FDR). Smaller values (e.g., <= 0.05) indicate that the observed log2 fold change is unlikely to arise by chance.
Group mean for test sample group
Group stdev for test sample group
Group mean for reference sample group
Group stdev for reference sample group
